Wild Lychee for Associations

Your association's member portal, built in 5 minutes.

Member directory with company profiles, committee management, conference registration, resource library, and membership tiers — all in one portal you actually own. No per-member fees. No lock-in. From $5/mo.

Build Your Association Portal → Fork on GitHub

Built for Associations

Everything your professional association needs.

Six association-specific features, ready out of the box. Toggle them on with a config flag.

👥
Member Directory
Searchable profiles with company names, titles, specialties, and contact info. Filter by region or expertise.
🏛️
Committee Management
Working groups with chairs, members, meeting schedules, and shared documents. Track committee activities.
🎫
Conference & Events
Conference registration, session tracks, speaker bios, and attendee networking. Multi-day event support.
📚
Resource Library
Whitepapers, webinar recordings, industry reports, and best practices. Tier-gated access control.
🏅
Membership Tiers
Fellow, Member, Associate, and Student tiers with different permissions, pricing, and resource access.
📊
Member Insights
AI-powered engagement analytics. Spot at-risk renewals, identify active contributors, and track growth.

Pricing

Flat pricing. No per-member fees. Ever.

#!/usr/bin/env zsh
# ============================================
# Capture showcase screenshots for marketing site
# Uses Chrome headless mode (no dependencies needed)
#
# Usage:
#   ./marketing/capture-screenshots.sh          # all sites
#   ./marketing/capture-screenshots.sh eagles   # just eagles
# ============================================

set -e

SCRIPT_DIR="${0:a:h}"
ASSETS_DIR="$SCRIPT_DIR/assets"
mkdir -p "$ASSETS_DIR"

# Find Chrome
if [[ -d "/Applications/Google Chrome.app" ]]; then
  CHROME="/Applications/Google Chrome.app/Contents/MacOS/Google Chrome"
elif (( $+commands[google-chrome] )); then
  CHROME="google-chrome"
elif (( $+commands[chromium] )); then
  CHROME="chromium"
else
  echo "Chrome not found. Install Google Chrome."
  exit 1
fi

WIDTH=1280
HEIGHT=800

capture() {
  local name="$1"
  local url="$2"
  local output="$ASSETS_DIR/screenshot-${name}.png"

  echo "Capturing $name ($url)..."
  # Use a small HTML page that navigates to the URL, waits for JS to render, then screenshots
  local tmphtml=$(mktemp /tmp/capture-XXXXXX.html)
  cat > "$tmphtml" <<HTMLEOF
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html><body><script>
  // Navigate and wait for content to load
  window.location = '$url';
</script></body></html>
HTMLEOF

  # Use virtual-time-budget to let JS execute (5 seconds of simulated time)
  "$CHROME" \
    --headless=new \
    --disable-gpu \
    --no-sandbox \
    --hide-scrollbars \
    --window-size="${WIDTH},${HEIGHT}" \
    --virtual-time-budget=8000 \
    --screenshot="$output" \
    "$url" \
    2>/dev/null

  rm -f "$tmphtml"

  if [[ -f "$output" ]]; then
    local size=$(du -h "$output" | cut -f1)
    echo "  Saved: $output ($size)"
  else
    echo "  FAILED: $output not created"
  fi
}

# Showcase sites вҖ” add more as they're created
typeset -A SITES
SITES=(
  eagles          "https://eagles.run402.com"
  eagles-directory "https://eagles.run402.com/directory.html"
  eagles-events   "https://eagles.run402.com/events.html"
  eagles-forum    "https://eagles.run402.com/forum.html"
)

if [[ -n "$1" ]]; then
  if [[ -n "${SITES[$1]}" ]]; then
    capture "$1" "${SITES[$1]}"
  else
    echo "Unknown site: $1"
    echo "Available: ${(k)SITES}"
    exit 1
  fi
else
  for name url in "${(@kv)SITES}"; do
    capture "$name" "$url"
  done
fi

echo "Done."

Wild Lychee for Churches

Your congregation deserves a modern home online.

Sermon archives, prayer requests, small group sign-ups, youth programs, and multilingual support — all in one portal your church actually owns. No per-member fees. No lock-in. From $5/mo.

Build Your Church Portal → Fork on GitHub

Built for Churches

Everything your congregation needs.

Six church-specific features, ready out of the box. Toggle them on with a config flag.

📖
Sermon Library
Archive sermons with audio, video, notes, and scripture references. Searchable by topic, speaker, or date.
🙏
Prayer Requests
Members submit prayer requests with optional privacy settings. Congregation can respond with encouragement.
👥
Small Groups
Browse, join, and manage small groups with meeting times, locations, leaders, and member lists.
🎵
Worship Team Resources
Sheet music, chord charts, set lists, and rehearsal schedules in a member-only resource library.
🌐
Multi-Language Support
Serve your congregation in multiple languages. Built-in Portuguese/English support with AI-powered translation.
📅
Church Events
Sunday services, Bible studies, youth nights, potlucks — with RSVP tracking, reminders, and capacity limits.

Pricing

Flat pricing. No per-member fees. Ever.

Pricing Comparison

How Wild Lychee compares.

Community software doesn't have to cost hundreds per month. Here's how Wild Lychee stacks up against the incumbents.

Monthly cost by member count

Wild Lychee charges for hosting, not members. Your cost stays flat as you grow.

Members Wild Apricot Circle Bettermode Wild Lychee
100 $100/mo $89/mo $79/mo $5/mo
500 $200/mo $89/mo $199/mo $5/mo
2,000 $530/mo $219/mo $399/mo $10/mo
5,000 $900/mo $399/mo $599/mo $20/mo

Competitor pricing based on publicly listed plans as of March 2026. Wild Lychee pricing is Run402 hosting cost.

Built for HOAs

Everything your community association needs.

Six HOA-specific features, ready out of the box. Toggle them on with a config flag.

🔧
Maintenance Requests
Residents submit issues with photos and descriptions. Board tracks status from open to resolved.
📄
Document Archive
CC&Rs, meeting minutes, financial reports, and bylaws — organized, searchable, and always accessible.
✅
Voting & Polls
Run board elections, budget approvals, and community polls with transparent results and audit trails.
👤
Resident & Board Roles
Separate permissions for residents, board members, and property managers. Everyone sees what they need.
📷
Issue Submission
Report problems with photo uploads, location details, and priority levels. Track resolution in real time.
📢
Announcement Wall
Board posts announcements with reactions and comments. Pin important notices. Replace those paper flyers.

Pricing

Flat pricing. No per-unit fees. Ever.

Open Source Community Platform

Own your member portal.

Wild Lychee gives associations, clubs, churches, and HOAs a complete portal — member directory, events, forum, announcements, and resources — on software you control, for $5–20/mo.

Why Wild Lychee

Why organizations choose Wild Lychee.

💰
Predictable cost
No per-member fees. $5–20/mo flat, whether you have 50 members or 5,000. The price scales with your hosting tier, not your headcount.
🔒
You own everything
Your data, your branding, your domain. Open source — fork it, modify it, it's yours. No lock-in, no export fees, no surprises.
🤖
AI does the work
Studio builds your portal in 5 minutes. Pro keeps it evolving with ongoing AI customization. Or customize it yourself — it's just HTML and SQL.
Switching from Wild Apricot, Circle, or Bettermode? See the full comparison.

Get Started

How it works.

1
Pick a template
Choose your community type — church, HOA, sports league, association — or start with the default.
2
AI builds your portal
Studio investigates your existing site, asks a few questions, and generates a custom portal in minutes.
3
Launch and customize
Deploy to your domain. Edit content inline. Toggle features on and off. It's yours.

Everything You Need

One template. Every feature.

All features ship. Toggle them on with a config flag. No plugins, no marketplace, no upsells.

👥
Member Directory
Searchable profiles with custom fields, tiers, and role-based access.
📅
Events & RSVP
Calendar with capacity tracking, reminders, and attendee management.
📢
Announcements
Rich text posts with emoji reactions. Pin the important ones.
📚
Resource Library
Files, links, and documents with member-only access control.
💬
Forum
Categories, topics, threaded replies, and moderation tools.
🏛️
Committees
Working groups with roles, member assignments, and descriptions.
✏️
Inline Editing
The page IS the admin panel. Click to edit, no separate dashboard.
⚡
Config-Driven
Restructure your entire site with SQL. No code changes needed.

AI-Powered

Six AI features. Your API key.

Every AI feature is optional, bring-your-own-key, and runs on your schedule. No vendor lock-in. No surprise bills from us.

🛡️
Content Moderation
Auto-flag spam and toxicity. Review queue for admins. Runs every 15 minutes.
🌐
Auto-Translation
Publish once, serve in any language. Triggered on content publish.
📰
Newsletter Writer
AI drafts your weekly update from recent activity. You approve and send.
🎯
Smart Onboarding
Personalized welcome message for each new member based on their profile.
📊
Member Insights
Spot at-risk members before they leave. Daily analysis of engagement patterns.
📝
Event Recaps
AI writes the post-event summary from attendance and photos. You approve it.
🔑  Bring your own API key. Your AI, your cost, your control.

Who It's For

Built for communities of every kind.

Wild Lychee adapts to your community type with niche-specific templates, features, and seed data.

⛩
Churches & Religious Orgs
Sermons, prayer requests, small groups
🏢
Professional Associations
Directory, committees, conferences
⚽
Sports Leagues & Clubs
Rosters, schedules, standings
🏠
HOAs & Condos
Maintenance, documents, voting

Pricing

Simple, transparent pricing.

FAQ

Questions? We've got answers.

Is it really $5–20/mo?

Yes. Wild Lychee is open-source software. The $5–20/mo covers Run402 hosting (database, file storage, edge functions, subdomain). There are no per-member fees, no usage charges, and no hidden costs. The price scales with your hosting tier, not your member count.

Do I need technical skills?

Not with Studio. Tell us about your community, and AI builds your portal in minutes. For the DIY template, basic comfort with deploying web apps is helpful — but AI agents can handle that too.

Who owns the data?

You do. Wild Lychee runs on your own Run402 project with your own database. You can export, migrate, or delete at any time. We never touch your data.

Can I migrate from Wild Apricot or Circle?

Yes. Studio can investigate your existing site and migrate your branding, colors, and content structure. Member data can be imported via CSV. See our comparison page for details.

What does “AI-powered” actually mean?

Six optional AI features run on your own API key (OpenAI or Anthropic): content moderation, auto-translation, newsletter drafts, smart onboarding, member insights, and event recaps. You control what runs, when, and at what cost.

Why is it so affordable?

Because Wild Lychee is open source and runs on Run402's serverless infrastructure. There's no sales team, no enterprise licensing, and no per-seat revenue model. You pay for hosting, not for software.

Own your member portal.

Open source. Flat pricing. AI-powered. Yours forever.

Wild Lychee for Sports Leagues

Run your league like a pro. Without the pro price tag.

Team rosters, game schedules, season standings, registration, and photo galleries — all in one portal you actually own. No per-player fees. No lock-in. From $5/mo.

Build Your League Portal → Fork on GitHub

Built for Sports

Everything your league needs to compete.

Six sports-specific features, ready out of the box. Toggle them on with a config flag.

👥
Team Rosters
Player profiles with positions, jersey numbers, and stats. Coaches manage their own rosters.
📅
Game Schedules
Full season calendar with dates, times, locations, and opponents. Filter by team or division.
🏆
Season Standings
Auto-calculated win/loss records, points, and rankings. Updated after every game.
📝
Registration & RSVP
Season registration, game-day RSVPs, and waitlists. Track who's in and who's out.
📷
Photo Galleries
Game day photos, team shots, and highlight reels. Members upload, admins curate.
👤
Coach & Player Roles
Separate permissions for league admins, coaches, and players. Everyone sees what they need.

Pricing

Flat pricing. No per-player fees. Ever.
